title: vezz.io is Live! 🚀
content:
Drumroll please... vezz.io is finally live!

After way too many "just one more tweak" moments, I'm excited to share my personal blog and portfolio with the world. This is where I'll be posting updates about my projects, random thoughts on technology, and documenting my journey as a developer (mistakes included, because let's be real, that's where the real learning happens).

The name "vezz.io" stands for "Input Output from Vezz" - representing my continuous cycle of learning (input) and creating (output). It's nerdy, it's fun, and it's totally me.

So here's to building cool stuff, breaking things, and learning along the way. Let's go!
excerpt: After way too many tweaks, vezz.io is finally live! Time to share the journey.
